descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets the unit with the least HP
If target is an ally, this deals 0 damage
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttackHead] If target is an ally, heal them for 5% of user’s Max HP
[OnSucceedAttackTail] Inflict 7 [Combustion]; if target is an ally, give 2 [Agility] next turn

[OnSucceedAttackTail] Inflict 7 [Combustion]; if target is an ally, give 2 [Agility] and 1 [GainSinStockAdder] next turn
